bullets: U.S.-aided Mexican Army operation kills top cartel leaders amid ongoing clashes with gunmen.
Republican President brokers fragile ceasefire in Gaza as heavy rains flood tents and Israel kills two more Palestinians.
U.S. forces capture Venezuelan autocratic leader Nicolás Maduro.
Former UK Prime Minister Boris Johnson calls on allies to send noncombat troops to Ukraine ahead of a potential ceasefire.
Trump's 10% global tariffs on imports take effect, impacting international trade.
market_mood: Global markets show cautious sentiment amid the implementation of Trump's 10% tariffs, with concerns over potential trade wars and economic disruptions.
hot_spot: The capture of Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro by U.S. forces represents the single most urgent geopolitical situation, potentially reshaping regional dynamics.
